Suggestion: The system shall handle up to 500 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: R7

Suggestion: The system shall provide a 'Forgot Password' feature that allows users to reset their password via email verification.

Label: R13
Issue: Does not specify what happens to unsaved data when a user is logged off due to inactivity.
Suggestion: The system shall save the user's work automatically before logging off due to inactivity.

Label: R17
Issue: Does not specify if the reminder popup can be dismissed or snoozed.
Suggestion: The reminder popup shall have options to dismiss or snooze the reminder.

Label: R19
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the immunization reminder is ignored.
Suggestion: If the immunization reminder is ignored, the system shall send an alert to the administrator.

Label: R22
Issue: Does not specify the format or details included in the immunization notification on the invoice.
Suggestion: The immunization notification on the invoice shall include the child's name, the immunization due date, and the type of immunization required.

Label: R26
Issue: Does not specify the format or details included in the account history.
Suggestion: The account history shall include the date, description of the activity, and the amount involved.

Label: R28
Issue: Does not specify how late pick-up fees are calculated and added to the invoice.
Suggestion: Late pick-up fees shall be calculated based on the number of hours late and added to the invoice automatically.

Label: R29
Issue: Does not specify the format or details included in the invoices.
Suggestion: Invoices shall include a breakdown of charges, payment due date, and any applicable discounts or late fees.

Label: R39
Issue: Does not specify how changes to account information are tracked and displayed.
Suggestion: Changes to account information shall be tracked with a timestamp and user ID, and displayed in an audit log accessible to administrators.

Label: R44
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the maximum number of children in a classroom is exceeded.
Suggestion: If the maximum number of children in a classroom is exceeded, the system shall place additional children on a waiting list.

Label: R47
Issue: Does not specify how the waiting list is managed and how parents are notified of openings.
Suggestion: The waiting list shall be managed on a first-come, first-served basis, and parents shall be notified of openings via email or phone.

Label: R50
Issue: Does not specify the expected performance metrics for the system's response time.
Suggestion: The system shall respond to all user requests within 5 seconds under normal operating conditions.

Label: Section 3

Suggestion: The NCCM system shall interact with external systems such as payment gateways, email servers, and third-party authentication services.

Label: Section 4
Issue: Does not specify the hardware and software requirements for the Web server supporting ASP.NET.
Suggestion: The Web server shall have at least 8GB RAM, a quad-core processor, and run Windows Server 2016 or later with IIS installed.
